# st-alicloud_ecd_simple_office_site (Resource)

Provides a Alicloud ECD Custom Simple Office Site Resource.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "st-alicloud_ecd_simple_office_site" "test" {
  office_site_name    = "test-office-site"
  cidr_block          = "172.16.0.0/12"
  desktop_access_type = "Internet"
  enable_admin_access = true
  vpc_type            = "customized"
  vpc_id              = "vpc-test"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cidr_block` (String)

### Optional

- `bandwidth` (Number, Deprecated)
- `cen_id` (String)
- `cen_owner_id` (String)
- `desktop_access_type` (String)
- `enable_admin_access` (Boolean)
- `enable_cross_desktop_access` (Boolean)
- `enable_internet_access` (Boolean, Deprecated)
- `mfa_enabled` (Boolean)
- `office_site_name` (String)
- `sso_enabled` (Boolean)
- `vpc_id` (String)
- `vpc_type` (String)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of the Simple Office Site.
- `status` (String)
